_meta.description: Demo seed data for hunterslab Field Journal
_meta.persona: Alex Chen, fictional solo founder building an AI consulting practice in Singapore
_meta.note: All names, companies, and events are fictional. Replace with your own when forking.

entries.summary: Set up FoundryAI Consulting LLC. Met Marcus over coffee to scope a possible partnership. Got verbal commitment from Sarah to be an advisor.
details: Incorporated FoundryAI Consulting LLC in Singapore. Director appointed via nominee service.
Marcus open to co-marketing for Q2 cohort program. Wants revenue share clarity first.
Sarah agreed to advisor role pending term sheet. Equity vs cash tbd.
entries.ai_insight: The week's pattern is clear — moving from solo to a network model. The advisor relationship with Sarah is the highest-leverage piece; pin down terms before her schedule fills.

entries.summary: Drafted positioning v1 for FoundryAI. Spoke at the AI Builders Meetup — 4 inbound leads from the talk.
details: Positioning: 'Embedded AI strategy for early-stage product teams.' Tighter than v0.
Meetup talk well-received. Priya wants intro to enterprise design contact.
Jamie reached out separately about a recruiting collaboration.
entries.ai_insight: Public surface area is paying off. The 4 inbound leads validate the positioning. Worth treating speaking gigs as a primary distribution channel for Q2.

entries.summary: Strategy review. Decided to deprioritize the FormerCo retainer and double down on direct consulting clients.
details: FormerCo retainer feels increasingly like a constraint, not a runway.
Direct consulting clients have 3x the per-hour rate.
David's intro to the angel group still pending — not blocking.
entries.ai_insight: The hardest call you made this week was letting the FormerCo retainer cool. Independence has a price tag and you just paid it.

projects.name: FoundryAI Consulting
projects.description: Solo AI strategy consulting practice. Positioning v1 in progress.
projects.ai_status: Entity formed. Positioning sharpening. Pipeline starting via speaking.

projects.name: AI Summit Speaking Slot
projects.description: Keynote on 'AI in non-AI companies' at the regional AI Summit.
projects.ai_status: Slot confirmed. Outline due in 2 weeks. Slides 0%.

projects.name: Newsletter Launch
projects.description: Weekly publication on AI strategy for SEA market.
projects.ai_status: Domain registered. First issue drafted. Soft launch next Monday.

projects.name: Advisor Network Build-out
projects.description: Recruit 3 advisors across product, GTM, and capital.
projects.ai_status: 1 of 3 verbally committed (Sarah). Pipeline of 4 conversations.

projects.name: Vibe Coding Practice
projects.description: 3-week Codex / Claude Code practice. Build a tool that solves a real problem.
projects.ai_status: Week 1 of 3. Built this journal as practice project.

projects.name: FormerCo Retainer
projects.ai_status: Cooling. Decided to deprioritize in favor of direct consulting.

connections.name: Sarah Lim
connections.role: VP Product at a regional tech company. Pragmatic, well-networked, fast decisions.
resources: Network into corporate buyers in SEA
Pattern recognition on early-stage product mistakes
Willing to make 2-3 warm intros per quarter
potential: Formalize advisor agreement (0.25% equity over 2 years)
Pipe early clients through her warm intros
Quarterly review session on positioning + pricing
Long-term: potential board seat if FoundryAI scales
connections.private_note: Demo placeholder — use this field for your own honest assessment of the relationship.

connections.name: Marcus Zhang
connections.role: Founder of an AI dev tools startup, YC-backed. Building in adjacent space, not competitive.
resources: Investor relationships in SF and SG
Audience overlap with my target market
potential: Co-host a Q2 cohort program (50/50 split tbd)
Future: technical co-founder candidate if I need one
Refer enterprise leads that need both consulting + tooling
connections.private_note: Demo placeholder — keep your honest read of motivations and trust level here.

connections.name: Priya Raj
connections.role: Independent growth marketing consultant. Frequent collaborator on conference content.
potential: Refer her for client GTM work
connections.private_note: Demo placeholder — useful for tracking working chemistry over time.

connections.name: Jamie Tan
connections.role: Independent recruiter focused on AI engineering roles in SEA.
potential: Share market intel for my consulting briefs
Possible joint placement structure for specialized roles

connections.name: David Kim
connections.role: Angel investor and operator. Has indicated potential pre-seed interest 'when the time is right'.
potential: Not pushing — let it cool naturally
Send quarterly update when there's substance
Revisit if/when FoundryAI needs growth capital

connections.name: Rachel Wong
connections.role: Former colleague. Strong relationship in the past, not active currently.
potential: No specific ask — relationship maintenance only
